prestazioni: Engine: BP-4W (1.8L DOHC 16V) with forged internals including Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings to handle 300+ HP reliably. Paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Racing Beat for optimized spool and flow.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (Walbro 450 LPH pumps) and an AEM 340LPH in-tank pump, controlled via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability and individual cylinder tuning.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (OS G32-1.5WAY) with 85% lockup under power, paired with a PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset (close-ratio) and a Fidanza 7.5lb aluminum flywheel. Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with billet cover for 500+ ft-lb torque capacity.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (MX-5 NB-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and duckbill rear wing. Full seam-welded chassis with custom roll cage (1.75-inch DOM tubing) by Custom Cages UK, integrated with the Rocket Bunny rear diffuser for aero balance.

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 17x9 +22 front and 17x10 +25 rear, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires. Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) by Hardrace for aggressive flush fitment.

Interior: Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, bolted to a custom aluminum seat mount. Full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard, door cards, and shift boot by Seibon Carbon, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Mod.78 350mm suede wheel.
